title: Ceiba chodatii
taxonomy: Ceiba chodatii is a species of tree in the family Malvaceae. It is a member of the genus Ceiba, which is a group of tropical trees native to the Americas. Within the family Malvaceae, Ceiba chodatii belongs to the subfamily Bombacoideae. The exact classification of Ceiba chodatii may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the order Malvales. Ceiba chodatii is also sometimes classified as a synonym of other species within the Ceiba genus.
uses: Ceiba chodatii is a plant species native to Central America, and its medicinal uses are largely unexplored. However, Ceiba chodatii has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Further research is necessary to fully understand the medicinal properties and uses of Ceiba chodatii.
